name: chip50-survey-mcp
description: MCP server for analyzing CHIP50 survey data using BigQuery with weighted cross-tabulations and demographic analysis
long_description:
A comprehensive Model Context Protocol server that enables AI assistants to perform sophisticated survey analysis on CHIP50 data. Features include:

- **BigQuery Upload**: Seamlessly upload CSV files (demographics and survey responses) to BigQuery tables with configurable write modes
- **Weighted Cross-Tabulations**: Generate statistically-weighted cross-tabs of survey responses across demographic categories directly in BigQuery
- **Flexible Analysis**: Support for wave filtering, custom SQL conditions, and multiple demographic breakdowns
- **Production-Ready**: Designed for large-scale survey data analysis with proper error handling and validation

Ideal for researchers, data analysts, and survey professionals working with CHIP50 panel data.

tools.name: upload_csv_to_bigquery
tools.description: Upload CSV files (demographic or survey data) to BigQuery tables. Creates tables if they don't exist, with configurable write modes (truncate, append, or fail if exists).

tools.name: generate_bigquery_crosstab
tools.description: Generate weighted cross-tabulations using BigQuery. Joins demographics and survey response tables to calculate weighted proportions of survey responses across demographic categories. Returns both counts and percentages.

privacy_policies.name: Google Cloud BigQuery
privacy_policies.description: This extension uploads data to and queries Google Cloud BigQuery. All data is processed according to Google Cloud's privacy policy.
